text:
So many retro projects getting revived now with AI, which ones should I check out?

I saw people reverse engineering Gameboy games etc.

Indiana Toll Roads Coming!
Ken Colbert & the Indiana Freedom Caucus join THE JOHN RUST SHOW to discuss Indiana Election Law and the coming TOLLS now authorized for ALL Indiana interstate highways.
The Indiana political establishment in a RED state works to block TRUE

ever wonder how much those annoying games on tiktok make?

here’s one

$80 million a month

only 1 year old btw

the reason performance models work so well:

spend stops feeling risky

if it works, you pay

if it doesn’t, you don’t

alignment makes growth less stressful

people overestimate strategy and underestimate stamina

the founder who stays consistent for 3 years beats the genius who sprints for 6 months

stay in the game

the older i get, the more i believe serendipity isn’t luck

it’s proximity

put yourself around ambitious people long enough and opportunities start to appear

a good product with no eyeballs dies

a decent product with strong distribution iterates its way to great

distribution > product

i feel like we’ve done more in the last 2 months at yc than in the previous 2 years

the fastest way to raise your standards is to change your environment
